lines.speaker: Mishkal'un Dorn
lines.text: You are excused. And you are welcome.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me...er...thanks.

lines.speaker: Mishkal'un Dorn
lines.text: We are the Order of the Dagon'hai.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Mishkal'un Dorn
lines.text: Through my magic, I can see a short way into the future.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you seem to know what I'm going to say? ...Er...oh.

lines.speaker: Mishkal'un Dorn
lines.text: These are the Tunnels of Chaos.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is...uh...aha! I'm not going to ask that. So you got it wrong!

lines.speaker: Mishkal'un Dorn
lines.text: Indeed. You are very clever.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So I won!

lines.speaker: Mishkal'un Dorn
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, what is this place?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I mean...Argh! How do you do that?

lines.speaker: Mishkal'un Dorn
lines.text: I can tell that your mind is not suited to the paradoxicalities of precognition.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: My what does what now?

lines.speaker: Mishkal'un Dorn
lines.text: You get confused very easily.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I knew that.

lines.speaker: Mishkal'un Dorn
lines.text: Of course you did. Speak to one of my order here. They will be able to explain in a manner more suited to your understanding.

lines.speaker: Mishkal'un Dorn
lines.text: You are welcome, [player name]. There is a bed around here if you wish.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks. My name's [player name], by the w...uh...okay, I think I need to lie down.
